title: 6 INSANE Claude Cowork Use Cases to Save Hours (AI Workflow Automation)
summary: A video tutorial demonstrating six practical workflows using Claude Cowork, including automated morning briefs, content generation, inbox triage, research reports, dashboards, and mobile agent control. The tutorial emphasizes that Cowork extends beyond chatbot functionality to enable multi-step automation tasks.
writeup: The video walks through six workflow automation use cases built with Claude Cowork: morning briefing automation, content generation, inbox triage, research report generation, dashboard creation, and mobile agent control. It demonstrates how an agent can handle recurring tasks across briefing, communication, and reporting work. The concrete takeaways are the six concrete patterns themselves, showing where agent-driven automation fits into a daily workflow.
